No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly focuses on developing technical and practical skills for real-life applications, directly aligning with Target 4.4 on relevant skills for employment and entrepreneurship.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters 'knowledge of business innovation,' market analysis, and business model definition, directly supporting entrepreneurship and productive activities (Targets 8.2, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core focus is 'Information Systems Project,' involving technology development, systems analysis, and application building, directly aligning with Target 9.5 (technological capabilities, innovation) and 9.b (domestic technology development).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The 'Social responsibility and ethics' core competence has a tangential, inferred link to encouraging sustainable practices (Target 12.6), though not a direct focus.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The 'Social responsibility and ethics' competence and the explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' inferentially support the rule of law (Target 16.3) and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course emphasizes 'Teamwork and leadership abilities' and engaging 'upstream/downstream vendors and users,' directly supporting multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
